name: n8n
description: Execute workflows, manage nodes, and automate tasks via n8n MCP server
longDescription: Official n8n MCP server for interacting with your n8n instance. Execute workflows, manage credentials, access workflow data, and trigger workflows via MCP. Supports both OAuth2 and personal MCP Access Token authentication. Requires self-hosted or cloud n8n instance with MCP enabled.
author: n8n

apiKeyConfig.label: n8n MCP Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Generate an MCP Access Token in n8n Settings > Instance-level MCP > Connection details > Access Token tab

examplePrompts: Execute the 'Process Lead' workflow with this data
List all active workflows in my n8n instance
Show me recent executions of the 'Daily Report' workflow
Activate the webhook workflow for incoming orders
Find failed executions from the last 24 hours
